mapper.select: SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.public_id = #{postId}

SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

WITH cursor_post AS ( SELECT created_at, id FROM posts WHERE public_id = #{lastId.value} ) SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p CROSS JOIN cursor_post c LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.created_at < c.created_at OR (p.created_at = c.created_at AND p.id < c.id) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

WITH cursor_post AS ( SELECT created_at, id FROM posts WHERE public_id = #{lastId.value} ) SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p CROSS JOIN cursor_post c LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND ( p.created_at < c.created_at OR (p.created_at = c.created_at AND p.id < c.id) ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.caption LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

WITH cursor_post AS ( SELECT created_at, id FROM posts WHERE public_id = #{lastId.value} ) SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p CROSS JOIN cursor_post c LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.caption LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND ( p.created_at < c.created_at OR (p.created_at = c.created_at AND p.id < c.id) ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT p.public_id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.storage_type AS image_storage_type, i.object_key AS image_object_key, i.file_extension, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.public_id = i.post_id WHERE p.has_location = true AND p.latitude BETWEEN #{boundingBox.minLat} AND #{boundingBox.maxLat} AND p.longitude BETWEEN #{boundingBox.minLng} AND #{boundingBox.maxLng} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
